case_title: MARIA CONCEPCION I. PERALES VS. MARTIN ROSSETTI

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERALES, MARIA CONCEPCION I. DBA EYELINE TELEPROMPTING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSSETTI, MARTIN $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $19.59 INTEREST, $97.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $616.59, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY PERALES, MARIA CONCEPCION I. DBA EYELINE TELEPROMPTING AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSETTI, MARTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSETTI, MARTIN HEARING SET FOR SEP-23-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSETTI, MARTIN HEARING SET FOR NOV-04-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR NOV 4, 2010; JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARTIN ROSSETTI FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00.
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSETTI, MARTIN
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $20.58 ACCRUED INTEREST, $355.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSETTI, MARTIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-15-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSETTI, MARTIN
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO MARTIN ROSSETTI
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT RETURNED BY SHERIFF, UNSERVED, OUTDATED FORM FOR BENCH WARRANT AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSETTI, MARTIN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERALES, MARIA CONCEPCION I. DBA EYELINE TELEPROMPTING AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSETTI, MARTIN
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERALES, MARIA CONCEPCION I. DBA EYELINE TELEPROMPTING

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2010 IS CONTINUED TO NOV-22-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER SLAVIT FORWARDED TO S.F. SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSETTI, MARTIN
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT RETURNED BY SHERIFF, UNSERVED, SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSETTI, MARTIN
COPYING FEES (4 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PERALES, MARIA CONCEPCION I. DBA EYELINE TELEPROMPTING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
